name: item_master
description: Enterprise item master — manage raw materials, finished goods, WIP, and packaging with full planning and costing data.
tables: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS item_master
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS item_master.unit_of_measures (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), uom_code VARCHAR(10) UNIQUE NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, is_base BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS item_master.item_categories (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), category_code VARCHAR(20) UNIQUE NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, parent_id UUID REFERENCES item_master.item_categories(id))

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS item_master.items (id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), item_code VARCHAR(50) UNIQUE NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, description TEXT, item_type VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT', category_id UUID REFERENCES item_master.item_categories(id), base_uom_id UUID REFERENCES item_master.unit_of_measures(id), is_lot_tracked BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), version INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 1)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS item_master.item_planning (item_id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES item_master.items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, safety_stock NUMERIC(12,4) DEFAULT 0.0000, reorder_point NUMERIC(12,4) DEFAULT 0.0000, lead_time_days INT DEFAULT 0, min_order_qty NUMERIC(12,4) DEFAULT 1.0000)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS item_master.item_costing (item_id UUID PRIMARY KEY REFERENCES item_master.items(id) ON DELETE CASCADE, costing_method VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'STANDARD', standard_cost NUMERIC(15,4) DEFAULT 0.0000, avg_cost NUMERIC(15,4) DEFAULT 0.0000, currency VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'USD')
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_im_items_status ON item_master.items(status)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_im_items_type   ON item_master.items(item_type)

INSERT INTO item_master.unit_of_measures (uom_code, name, is_base) VALUES ('PCS','Pieces',TRUE),('KG','Kilograms',TRUE),('LTR','Liters',TRUE),('MTR','Meters',FALSE),('BOX','Box',FALSE),('SET','Set',FALSE) ON CONFLICT (uom_code) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO item_master.item_categories (category_code, name) VALUES ('RAW','Raw Materials'),('ELEC','Electronics'),('MECH','Mechanical Parts'),('CHEM','Chemicals'),('PKG','Packaging'),('FG','Finished Goods') ON CONFLICT (category_code) DO NOTHING

actions.name: list_uoms
actions.sql: SELECT id, uom_code, name, is_base FROM item_master.unit_of_measures ORDER BY uom_code

actions.name: list_categories
actions.sql: SELECT c.id, c.category_code, c.name, p.name AS parent_name FROM item_master.item_categories c LEFT JOIN item_master.item_categories p ON p.id = c.parent_id ORDER BY c.name

actions.name: list_items
actions.sql: SELECT i.id, i.item_code, i.name, i.item_type, i.status, i.is_lot_tracked, i.created_at, i.version, c.name AS category_name, u.uom_code AS base_uom_code FROM item_master.items i LEFT JOIN item_master.item_categories c ON c.id = i.category_id LEFT JOIN item_master.unit_of_measures u ON u.id = i.base_uom_id WHERE ($1::text IS NULL OR i.status = $1) AND ($2::text IS NULL OR i.item_type = $2) AND ($3::text IS NULL OR i.category_id = $3::uuid) AND ($4::text IS NULL OR i.item_code ILIKE '%' || $4 || '%' OR i.name ILIKE '%' || $4 || '%') ORDER BY i.item_code LIMIT $5::integer OFFSET $6::integer

actions.name: count_items
actions.sql: SELECT COUNT(*)::integer AS total FROM item_master.items i WHERE ($1::text IS NULL OR i.status = $1) AND ($2::text IS NULL OR i.item_type = $2) AND ($3::text IS NULL OR i.category_id = $3::uuid) AND ($4::text IS NULL OR i.item_code ILIKE '%' || $4 || '%' OR i.name ILIKE '%' || $4 || '%')

actions.name: get_item
actions.sql: SELECT i.id, i.item_code, i.name, i.description, i.item_type, i.status, i.category_id, i.base_uom_id, i.is_lot_tracked, i.created_at, i.updated_at, i.version, c.name AS category_name, u.uom_code AS base_uom_code, p.safety_stock, p.reorder_point, p.lead_time_days, p.min_order_qty, co.costing_method, co.standard_cost, co.avg_cost, co.currency FROM item_master.items i LEFT JOIN item_master.item_categories c ON c.id = i.category_id LEFT JOIN item_master.unit_of_measures u ON u.id = i.base_uom_id LEFT JOIN item_master.item_planning p ON p.item_id = i.id LEFT JOIN item_master.item_costing co ON co.item_id = i.id WHERE i.id = $1

actions.name: insert_item
actions.sql: INSERT INTO item_master.items (item_code, name, description, item_type, category_id, base_uom_id, is_lot_tracked) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5::uuid, $6::uuid, $7) RETURNING id, item_code, name, status, version, created_at

actions.name: upsert_item_planning
actions.sql: INSERT INTO item_master.item_planning (item_id, safety_stock, reorder_point, lead_time_days, min_order_qty) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4, $5) ON CONFLICT (item_id) DO UPDATE SET safety_stock=$2, reorder_point=$3, lead_time_days=$4, min_order_qty=$5 RETURNING item_id

actions.name: upsert_item_costing
actions.sql: INSERT INTO item_master.item_costing (item_id, costing_method, standard_cost, avg_cost, currency) VALUES ($1::uuid, $2, $3, $4, $5) ON CONFLICT (item_id) DO UPDATE SET costing_method=$2, standard_cost=$3, avg_cost=$4, currency=$5 RETURNING item_id

actions.name: update_item
actions.sql: UPDATE item_master.items SET item_code=$2, name=$3, description=$4, item_type=$5, category_id=$6::uuid, base_uom_id=$7::uuid, is_lot_tracked=$8, updated_at=now(), version=version+1 WHERE id=$1 AND version=$9 RETURNING id, item_code, name, status, version

actions.name: change_item_status
actions.sql: UPDATE item_master.items SET status=$2, updated_at=now(), version=version+1 WHERE id=$1 RETURNING id, status, version

actions.name: delete_item
actions.sql: DELETE FROM item_master.items WHERE id=$1 RETURNING id

actions.name: insert_uom
actions.sql: INSERT INTO item_master.unit_of_measures (uom_code, name, is_base) VALUES ($1, $2, $3) ON CONFLICT (uom_code) DO NOTHING RETURNING id, uom_code, name

actions.name: insert_category
actions.sql: INSERT INTO item_master.item_categories (category_code, name, parent_id) VALUES ($1, $2, $3::uuid) ON CONFLICT (category_code) DO NOTHING RETURNING id, category_code, name
